description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This sleek black tunic can be worn with strappy slip on flats and cream coloured leggings for as a casual evening wear. Product Details Black sleeveless tunic with a round neckline, has a draped detail below the neckline, rosette detail on the left shoulder and flaring tucks from waist down Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
